title: VisualAnalysis
description: DRAFT v0 — L2c visual semantics + register, DERIVED from a perception artifact (TEXT-ONLY: this agent reads perception.json and NEVER the image). Ring 2, brand-free: it buckets perception's literal scene/look into controlled vocab and NAMES the register (the impression layer). Re-runnable without spending vision tokens. Worker B in the perception(observe) ⊥ visual-analyst(label) split.

product_state.description: DERIVED from perception subjects: product + human/human_part present ⇒ in_use/held; product alone ⇒ standalone; only a carton ⇒ packaging_only; no product ⇒ none.

register.description: The impression layer (ring 2) — NAMED from perception's look facts. Brand-free: this is what the AD reads as on its own terms, NOT whether it fits our brand (that is the brief, ring 3).

register_basis.description: Anti-hallucination trace: which specific perception look/scene facts this register was derived from (e.g. 'soft_diffused light + neutral palette + minimal props'). A register with no basis in the perception facts is a defect.
